description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI build that runs on push, pull request, and when a release is created. Use a matrix job that runs on multiple operating systems (ubuntu-16.04, ubuntu-18.04, ubuntu-20.04, macos-10.15, windows-2019) with steps to check out the code, fetch more history, and then build the project using cmake and make on Linux/macOS or cmake and msbuild on Windows.
